metaDescriptions./: We place vetted sales reps, build the playbook, and manage the pipeline. Founder-led businesses get their first qualified meetings within 30 days.
metaDescriptions./services: Four services built for founder-led B2B businesses: assigned SDR placement, sales playbook build, outbound system build, and pipeline management. Deployed within 14 days.
metaDescriptions./case-studies: 120 qualified appointments booked for a B2B SaaS client. 2.4x conversion improvement for a health and wellness client. Real outcomes from real engagements.
metaDescriptions./about: Katleho Mohlomi built outbound sales systems for 15+ B2B clients across SaaS, health, legal, and fintech before founding Millionaire Contracts.
metaDescriptions./contact: Book a free strategy call with Millionaire Contracts. No commitment. We review your pipeline and your ICP before we talk.

contentGaps: Founder-specific ROI framework: 'Should I outsource sales or hire?' -- no interactive tool exists targeting founder-led businesses
Long-form case studies with 4-6 section narrative depth -- current industry standard is one-line metric cards
'Sales infrastructure' as a concept: no page ranks well for 'what is sales infrastructure for small business'
Industry-specific outsourced sales content: 'outsourced sales for SaaS founders' and 'outbound system for health and wellness B2B' have minimal competition
'Sales agency vs fractional sales leader' comparison -- dominated by self-promotional content; a neutral framework would rank well
